name: Franchise Connect - Franchisee Configuration
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Find"}, {"text": " "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/128-franchise-connect-franchisee-configuration#Faqs", "children": [{"text": "FAQs and related articles", "bold": true}]}, {"text": " ", "bold": true}, {"text": "at the bottom of this page"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Franchise Connect brings all of your Franchisee's Retail Express data into a single location for high level reporting. In order for this to occur smoothly, configuration is required at both the Franchiser (Head Office) and the Franchisee level."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "At a Franchisee level, the following must be confirmed in Retail Express:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "All Outlets must have an assigned Country"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Countries cannot have a Currency Multiplier of 0 (zero)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Consolidated Packages - Individual components of Packages must have a Retail Price > $0"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "All suppliers must have a name"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "There are no more than 4 Custom Product Attributes"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": "Ensure a Country has been created for each Country that you trade in."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For more information on Countries, please see "}, {"text": "Countries"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Check the Countries are assigned to the Outlets", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > Locations / Outlets > Outlets", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Ensure each Outlet listed has a Country assigned"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To "}, {"text": "edit/update", "bold": true}, {"text": " an Outlet click the "}, {"text": "edit", "bold": true}, {"text": " (pencil) icon next to the Outlet"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Outlet information will populate into the "confirm-all-suppliers-have-a-name"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If any suppliers have no name, they will not be able to sync to Franchise Connect."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": each Supplier listed has a Name (the supplier name cannot be blank)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To "}, {"text": "edit/update", "bold": true}, {"text": " The Currency Multiplier Exchange Rate is applied to your data at the time of import into Franchise Connect; you will need to ensure this value is configured correctly."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "Navigate to"}, {"text": " Settings > Locations / Outlets > Countries", "bold": true}, {"text": "Ensure each Country has a valid "}, {"text": "Currency Multiplier", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "For more information on Countries, please see "}, {"text": "Countries"}]}], "appearance": "alert"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/128-franchise-connect-franchisee-configuration#collapseThree", "children": [{"text": "Confirm Package component Retail Pricing "}]}], "data-id": "confirm-package-component-retail-pricing"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "While Packages themselves will not synchronise through Franchise Connect, the sales of the Packages will still be synchronised for reporting purposes."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Package products and stock levels are not synchronised through Franchise Connect, but sales of Packages are."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Exploding (non-consolidated) Packages:", "bold": true}, {"text": " Synchronised as they appear in Retail Express, due to the fact they are exploded to a Product or line-by-line level upon adding to a sale."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Consolidated Packages:", "bold": true}, {"text": " exploded during the synchronisation (including discounts applied according to POS logic)."}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "For this reason components of consolidated Packages must have a Retail Price > $0 (see Exporting the Report section below for details on how to check this)."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To report on your Packages use the Package Details Report."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Reports > Stock Reports > Package Details Report", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "When viewing the details of the Packages, the far right column displays a tickbox indicating if the Product is treated as Individual Products."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Exporting the report:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Alternatively, you may find it easier to export the report and target the components (or child products) that need to have Retail Prices entered."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "From the results click Flat Export"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Once exported into Excel review the ChildPricePOS column"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Ensure that all values are greater than $0.00"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For more information on Packages, please see: "}, {"text": "Packages"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/128-franchise-connect-franchisee-configuration#custom-attributes", "children": [{"text": "Custom Product Attributes"}]}], "data-id": "custom-product-attributes"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "A maximum of four Custom Product Attributes are synchronised from Franchise Connect, so there cannot be more than 4 in use at the Franchisee member level (as you can only have a maximum of 8 Custom Attributes in use in a database)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The default attributes in Retail Express are:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Size"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Colour"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Season"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Brand"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To check if you have any Custom Attributes in use:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Log into Retail Express"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Settings > Product Attributes", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Your Attributes will be displayed"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For detailed information refer to the "}, {"text": "Franchise Connect ? Custom Product Attributes"}, {"text": " article."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Want more information?
